titles.title: There's a sweet sweet pirit in this place

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a sweet sweet spirit in this place And I know that it's the spirit of the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There are sweet expressions on each face And I know that it's the presence of the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sweet Holy Spirit Sweet heavenly dove Stay right here with us Filling us with your love And for these blessings We lift our hearts in praise (hearts in praise) Without a doubt we'll know that we have been revived When we shall leave this place
